FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string for the Git hash of the repository.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves loading times for features by quickly referencing the version of the code.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string that can change based on the repository's Git hash.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players always get the latest updates and features from the game.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Provides a dynamic string that reflects the current timestamp for flipping features.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Allows for real-time updates and changes in gameplay elements based on time.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast-access string for the current timestamp related to feature flips.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances performance by quickly accessing time-related data for smoother gameplay.
